summary: Tested PicksVault 'Show Different Options' (refresh-picks) and 'Send to Concierge' functionality. Backend APIs fully verified via pytest (10/10 tests passed). Frontend code review confirmed correct implementation. Mira-demo page caused browser crashes during Playwright testing, but the functionality appears correctly implemented based on code review and successful console logs showing '[PICKS READY] 🎁 6 products'.

testing_limitation.issue: Page crashes Playwright browser during screenshot operations, preventing full UI automation testing. The page loads and console shows products are ready, but automation becomes unstable.

critical_code_review_comments: PicksVault.jsx: handleRefresh correctly manages state (isRefreshing, refreshCount, displayedPicks) and calls onRefresh callback with exclude IDs
PicksVault.jsx: handleSendItemToConcierge properly marks items in sentItems Set, triggering visual overlay, with error handling to revert on failure
VaultManager.jsx: handleRefreshPicks correctly calls /api/mira/refresh-picks with pillar, pet_context, exclude_ids, and context
PicksVault.css: .pv-sent-overlay (green background) and .pv-refreshing (loading spinner) styles properly defined
All data-testid attributes present: picks-vault-refresh, picks-vault-send-{idx}, picks-vault-item-{idx}

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified correct implementation; browser automation limited due to page crash

context_for_next_testing_agent: PicksVault refresh and send-to-concierge functionality verified via backend tests. The mira-demo page is resource-intensive and causes browser crashes during Playwright automation. Console logs confirmed '[PICKS READY] 🎁 6 products' when sending product-related queries. For UI testing, consider testing on a simpler test page or with reduced viewport/features.

backend_tests_summary.test_refresh_picks_basic: PASSED - Returns 1-4 products with correct structure
backend_tests_summary.test_refresh_picks_excludes_ids: PASSED - Correctly excludes previously shown product IDs
backend_tests_summary.test_vault_response_structure: PASSED - Returns success, vault_type, notification_id, inbox_id, message

show_different_options_button.backend: VERIFIED - /api/mira/refresh-picks returns new products, excludes IDs
show_different_options_button.frontend_code: VERIFIED - handleRefresh sets isRefreshing, calls API, updates displayedPicks
show_different_options_button.loading_spinner: VERIFIED in code - isRefreshing state triggers .pv-refreshing CSS class
show_different_options_button.count_decrement: VERIFIED in code - refreshCount state increments, maxRefreshes check prevents over-refresh

send_to_concierge_individual_item.frontend_code: VERIFIED - handleSendItemToConcierge adds to sentItems Set
send_to_concierge_individual_item.sent_overlay: VERIFIED in code - .pv-sent-overlay shows green 'Sent to Concierge®' text
send_to_concierge_individual_item.stays_marked_as_sent: VERIFIED in code - sentItems Set persists until refresh clears it
